# Kunnskapsdepartementet

*15 lover*

| Lov | Korttittel | Ikrafttredelse | Historikk |
|-----|-----------|----------------|-----------|
| [Lov om barnehager (barnehageloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2005-06-17-64.md) | Barnehageloven – bhl | 2006-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2005-06-17-64.md) |
| [Lov om endringer i barnehageloven (styring og finansiering av barnehagesektoren)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2025-06-20-100.md) | Endringslov til barnehageloven | 2025-07-01, 2026-08-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2025-06-20-100.md) |
| [Lov om endringer i opplæringslova (rett til 12 timer gratis skolefritidsordning ](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2026-02-13-6.md) | Endringslov til opplæringslova | 2026-08-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2026-02-13-6.md) |
| [Lov om folkehøgskoler (folkehøgskoleloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2025-06-20-99.md) | Folkehøgskoleloven | 2025-08-01, 2026-08-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2025-06-20-99.md) |
| [Lov om godkjenning av yrkeskvalifikasjoner (yrkeskvalifikasjonsloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2017-06-16-69.md) | Yrkeskvalifikasjonsloven | 2018-01-01, 2019-03-01, Kongen bestemmer | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2017-06-16-69.md) |
| [Lov om grunnskoleopplæringa og den vidaregåande opplæringa (opplæringslova)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2023-06-09-30.md) | Opplæringslova | 2024-08-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2023-06-09-30.md) |
| [Lov om høyere yrkesfaglig utdanning (fagskoleloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2018-06-08-28.md) | Fagskoleloven | 2018-07-01, 2019-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2018-06-08-28.md) |
| [Lov om konsortium for europeisk forskingsinfrastruktur (ERIC-lova)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2015-12-11-99.md) | ERIC-lova | 2016-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2015-12-11-99.md) |
| [Lov om kristendomsundervisning ved vidaregåande skole, høgskole og universitet](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1971-12-17-106.md) | Kristendomslærelov for vidaregåande skoler m.v. | 1972-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-1971-12-17-106.md) |
| [Lov om organisering av forskningsetisk arbeid (forskningsetikkloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2017-04-28-23.md) | Forskningsetikkloven | 2017-05-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2017-04-28-23.md) |
| [Lov om private skolar med rett til statstilskot (privatskolelova)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2003-07-04-84.md) | Privatskolelova – prskol | 2003-10-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2003-07-04-84.md) |
| [Lov om studentsamskipnader (studentsamskipnadsloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2007-12-14-116.md) | Studentsamskipnadsloven | 2008-08-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2007-12-14-116.md) |
| [Lov om universiteter og høyskoler (universitets- og høyskoleloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2024-03-08-9.md) | Universitets- og høyskoleloven | 2024-08-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2024-03-08-9.md) |
| [Lov om utdanningsstøtte (utdanningsstøtteloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2005-06-03-37.md) | Utdanningsstøtteloven | 2005-07-15, 2006-01-01, 2006-08-15 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2005-06-03-37.md) |
| [Lov om voksenopplæring (voksenopplæringsloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2009-06-19-95.md) | Voksenopplæringsloven | 2010-01-01, 2010-07-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2009-06-19-95.md) |
